name: design-ai
description: Senior product designer for any AI coding agent. 20 skills, 17 commands, 4 review agents covering UI/UX, website improvement, design systems, motion, illustration, print, video, game UI, conversational, and spatial design. Korean market depth.

skills.name: design-system-builder
skills.description: Bootstrap a complete design system from a brand brief or single brand color.

skills.name: component-spec-writer
skills.description: Produce a developer-ready spec sheet for a single component.

skills.name: color-palette
skills.description: Generate a full palette (ramps + semantic aliases + dark mode) from inputs.

skills.name: ux-audit
skills.description: Audit a screen, flow, or page against UX best practices and a11y.

skills.name: design-critique
skills.description: Senior-designer feedback on a design proposal.

skills.name: handoff-spec
skills.description: Produce a developer handoff document from a finalized design.

skills.name: design-system-qa
skills.description: Audit a design system across 5 testing layers (types / tokens / contract / a11y / visual).

skills.name: design-pr-review
skills.description: Review a GitHub PR for design system compliance. Uses GitHub MCP.

skills.name: website-improvement
skills.description: Plan website audits, Site Profiles, MCP readiness, refactor tasks, prompts, and handoff reports.

skills.name: figma-token-sync
skills.description: Sync tokens between Figma and code. Uses Figma MCP.

skills.name: design-broadcast
skills.description: Post artifacts to Slack / Notion. Uses Slack + Notion MCPs.

skills.name: document-author
skills.description: Write technical / product documentation. Diátaxis-aware. Korean-aware.

skills.name: slide-deck-author
skills.description: Outline a slide deck (talk / pitch / reading). Message-led titles.

skills.name: motion-designer
skills.description: Spec motion for a screen / component / page. Picks tool, durations, easings; reduced-motion-safe.

skills.name: illustration-designer
skills.description: Design or spec an illustration system or piece. Style, voice, format; Korean-market-aware.

skills.name: print-designer
skills.description: Spec a print piece. CMYK + Pantone, bleed, finish; Korean print conventions.

skills.name: video-designer
skills.description: Spec video for marketing, social, or in-product use. Korean ad disclosure + KFDA.

skills.name: game-ui-designer
skills.description: Spec game UI — HUD, menus, inventory, store. Korean conventions (확률 표시, 본인인증, PC bang).

skills.name: conversational-ui-designer
skills.description: Spec a conversational UI — voice, chatbot, AI chat. Korean conventions (해요체 / 합쇼체).

skills.name: spatial-designer
skills.description: Spec spatial / AR / VR / MR experiences. Comfort, accessibility, Korean Galaxy XR.

commands.name: design-from-brief
commands.description: Generate a complete design system from a one-paragraph product brief.

commands.name: iterate
commands.description: Apply a critique to an existing artifact, produce a revision + changelog.

commands.name: slide-deck
commands.description: Generate a slide deck outline from a brief.

commands.name: design-review
commands.description: Run UX audit + a11y review + design critique in parallel and combine.

commands.name: website-improvement
commands.description: Plan a website improvement project with profile, audits, MCP readiness, prompts, and handoff.

commands.name: palette-from-brand
commands.description: Generate a full palette from a brand input.

commands.name: component-spec
commands.description: Spec a single component using the component-spec-writer skill.

commands.name: motion-design
commands.description: Spec motion for a screen / component / page.

commands.name: illustration
commands.description: Design or spec an illustration system or piece.

commands.name: video
commands.description: Spec video for marketing, social, or in-product.

commands.name: conversational
commands.description: Spec a chatbot / voice / AI chat / live agent.

commands.name: spatial
commands.description: Spec a VR / AR / MR / WebXR experience.

commands.name: stability-review
commands.description: Run the quarterly stability review report. Surfaces promotion candidates + stale files.

agents.name: design-critic
agents.description: Senior-designer critique with focus on hierarchy, craft, decisions.

agents.name: token-extractor
agents.description: Extract design tokens from raw source files.
